intake.description: MOU has been Active (post-signing) for more than N days but no IntakeRecord exists. Reminder targets the salesOwner to chase intake completion.

payment.description: Payment.piSentDate is older than N days and Payment.status is in {Pending, Overdue, PI Sent}. Reminder targets the school SPOC to chase outstanding instalment.

delivery-ack.description: Dispatch.stage is delivered (or Dispatch.deliveredAt is set) for more than N days and acknowledgementUrl is null. Reminder targets the school SPOC to confirm delivery.

feedback-chase.description: A feedback-request Communication was queued more than N days ago and no Feedback record was submitted for the same mouId + installmentSeq. Reminder targets the SPOC who got the original request.
